an5.129:1.1: “There are these five inhabitants of the states of deprivation, inhabitants of hell, who are in agony & incurable.
an5.129:1.3: One who has killed his/her mother, one who has killed his/her father, one who has killed an arahant, one who—with a corrupted mind—has caused the blood of a Tathāgata to flow, and one who has caused a split in the Saṅgha.
an5.129:1.4: These are the five inhabitants of the states of deprivation, inhabitants of hell, who are in agony & incurable.”
